What We Do

Built around what you actually need

Three core services, one standard of work. Whether it's a storefront, a lakeside rental, or an entire estate, we show up prepared and leave it spotless.

01

Commercial Cleaning

Reliable, recurring cleaning for offices, retail spaces, and commercial buildings — so your business always makes the right impression.

  • Office and workspace cleaning
  • Retail and storefront cleaning
  • Common area & restroom maintenance
  • Scheduled recurring service
  • Commercial move-in / move-out cleans
02

Vacation Rental Cleaning

Fast, dependable turnover cleaning between guests, so every stay starts spotless and every review reflects it.

  • Guest turnover cleaning
  • Linen and towel changeover
  • Restocking and staging
  • Same-day turnaround available
  • Damage & maintenance flagging
03

Residential Clean-Outs

Clearing out a home, estate, or rental unit — we handle the heavy lifting and leave the space ready for what's next.

  • Move-out and estate clean-outs
  • Hoarding situation cleanup
  • Furniture and debris removal
  • Donation and disposal sorting
  • Final deep clean included
How It Works

Simple. Seamless. Done right.

From your first call to the final walk-through, we keep it easy and transparent — no surprises, no runaround.

01

Get a Free Quote

Call or fill out our quick online form. We'll assess your space and provide a transparent, no-obligation estimate within hours.

02

Schedule Your Service

Pick a time that works for you. We work around your schedule — mornings, evenings, or weekends, we've got you covered.

03

We Get to Work

Shawn, Laura, and the team arrive on time with professional-grade equipment, ready to handle the job at hand.

04

You Enjoy the Results

Walk into a job done right. If anything's not perfect, we'll come back and fix it — no extra charge.

Why GKS

Six reasons people keep calling us back

We're not a franchise or a faceless crew. When you hire GKS, you get owners who answer the phone and stand behind every job.

Family Owned & Operated

Shawn and Laura run every job personally. You deal with owners who care about their name — not a call center.

Fully Insured & Bonded

Complete coverage on every job, so you can hand over the keys with total peace of mind.

Same-Day Turnaround

Guest checking out at 11 and another arriving at 4? We turn rentals fast without cutting corners.

Satisfaction Guaranteed

If something isn't right, we come back and make it right — no arguments, no extra charge.

Local & Responsive

Based right here in Port Huron. We know the area, we're close by, and we actually pick up the phone.

Transparent, Free Estimates

Clear pricing up front with no obligation. You'll know exactly what to expect before we start.
